channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US-Iran Live Updates: "Would Be Honoured To Meet": Trump On Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei

media:content.media:description: US-Iran War Live: The US said that it had "successfully defeated" a series of Iranian missile attacks.

item.description: US-Iran War Live: Iran fired missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain hours after US conducted strikes on Iran's Qeshm Island amid ongoing peace talks between Washington and Tehran.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War Live: Iran fired missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain hours after US conducted strikes on Iran's Qeshm Island amid ongoing peace talks between Washington and Tehran.

item.title: Putin Calls India A Global Power, Shares Russia's Strategy On Pak-China Ties

media:content.media:description: Putin also expressed confidence that Russia's economic ties with India would continue to expand

item.description: The Russian leader also said that Moscow would continue to deepen ties with India despite geopolitical tensions surrounding the country's global engagements.
item.content:encoded: The Russian leader also said that Moscow would continue to deepen ties with India despite geopolitical tensions surrounding the country's global engagements.

item.title: Xi Jinping To Visit North Korea Next Week, First Visit Since 2019

media:content.media:description: Chinese President Xi Jinping and North Korean leader Kim Jong Un in Beijing, China (file)

item.description: Pyongyang will be Xi's first overseas visit this year. He last travelled internationally in late October when he went to South Korea, where he also met Trump.
item.content:encoded: Pyongyang will be Xi's first overseas visit this year. He last travelled internationally in late October when he went to South Korea, where he also met Trump.

item.title: "PM Modi A Good Friend": Trump's Big Remark On India-US Trade Deal

media:content.media:description: A US delegation was in India earlier this week for negotiations on an interim bilateral agreement.

item.description: Responding to a question on the trade deal negotiation, Trump alleged India had taken advantage of US policies for years and charged tremendous tariffs, and his policies are just reversing that.
item.content:encoded: Responding to a question on the trade deal negotiation, Trump alleged India had taken advantage of US policies for years and charged tremendous tariffs, and his policies are just reversing that.

item.title: 'Heard Good Things': Trump Says He'd Be "Honoured" To Meet Iran's Mojtaba Khamenei
item.description: The US leader also said that he would be "honoured" to meet Iran's new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, if a deal is reached between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: The US leader also said that he would be "honoured" to meet Iran's new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, if a deal is reached between the two countries.

item.title: Nepal Foreign Minister On 3-Day India Visit To Reset Ties Amid Boundary Row

media:content.media:description: Analysts see the visit as a course correction driven by mutual necessity.

item.description: Shisir Khanal's New Delhi trip carries unmistakable diplomatic weight, signalling Kathmandu's intent to move past the friction and re-engage New Delhi at the highest levels.
item.content:encoded: Shisir Khanal's New Delhi trip carries unmistakable diplomatic weight, signalling Kathmandu's intent to move past the friction and re-engage New Delhi at the highest levels.

item.title: US House Approves Billions In Aid To Ukraine, Impose Sanctions On Russia

media:content.media:description: The 226-195 vote is a sign of impatience with President Donald Trump's approach to the war

item.description: The legislation seeks to cement US assistance for Ukraine by providing more than $1 billion in security and reconstruction aid.
item.content:encoded: The legislation seeks to cement US assistance for Ukraine by providing more than $1 billion in security and reconstruction aid.

item.title: Trump Says Bill Pulte Not His Permanent Pick As Intelligence Chief

media:content.media:description: Trump said other candidates were under consideration for nomination to the post.

item.description: The Republican president's disclosure that he was ruling out installing Pulte in the position full-time came after bipartisan pushback on Capitol Hill in recent days over Pulte's lack of national security experience.
item.content:encoded: The Republican president's disclosure that he was ruling out installing Pulte in the position full-time came after bipartisan pushback on Capitol Hill in recent days over Pulte's lack of national security experience.

item.title: How Trump-Brokered Ceasefires Are Failing To End Fighting In Middle East

media:content.media:description: The United States brokered a ceasefire between Israel and Hamas on October 10, 2025

item.description: Israeli airstrikes hit Gaza and Lebanon, with Israeli forces still actively deployed in both places. Hezbollah rockets struck northern Israel, and Iranian attacks targeted Kuwait's international airport.
item.content:encoded: Israeli airstrikes hit Gaza and Lebanon, with Israeli forces still actively deployed in both places. Hezbollah rockets struck northern Israel, and Iranian attacks targeted Kuwait's international airport.

item.title: In Open Letter, Zelensky Seeks Meeting With Putin. Russia Responds
item.description: Volodymyr Zelensky is welcome to meet his Russian counterpart Vladimir Putin in Moscow "any time", the Kremlin said Thursday after the Ukrainian president called to set a date for a face-to-face meeting between the pair to end the war.
item.content:encoded: Volodymyr Zelensky is welcome to meet his Russian counterpart Vladimir Putin in Moscow "any time", the Kremlin said Thursday after the Ukrainian president called to set a date for a face-to-face meeting between the pair to end the war.

item.title: 'Putting Pressure On PM Modi Detrimental For International Relations': Putin On Russia-India Ties

media:content.media:description: Putin said Russia considers India as a "reliable partner" (File photo)

item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin on Thursday hailed Moscow's strategic partnership with New Delhi and asserted that Western attempts to force India into scaling back its cooperation with Russia are futile and damaging to global stability.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1108869/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Russian President Vladimir Putin on Thursday hailed Moscow's strategic partnership with New Delhi and asserted that Western attempts to force India into scaling back its cooperation with Russia are futile and damaging to global stability.

item.title: UK PM Accuses Musk Of "Trying To Whip Up Division" Over Student's Murder

media:content.media:description: Keir Starmer also said that Elon Musk has been interfering in our politics in the last few days.

item.description: UK leader Keir Starmer accused US tech tycoon Elon Musk on Thursday of "trying to whip up division" in Britain following anger over the police handling of the murder of a white student by a Sikh man.
item.content:encoded: UK leader Keir Starmer accused US tech tycoon Elon Musk on Thursday of "trying to whip up division" in Britain following anger over the police handling of the murder of a white student by a Sikh man.

item.title: India-Born Entrepreneurs Behind 96 US Unicorns, Largest Among Immigrant Founders: Report

media:content.media:description: Mohit Aron (left), Aravind Srinivas (centre), and Sachin Nayyar.

item.description: Approximately two-thirds (66 per cent) of unicorns were founded or co-founded by immigrants or the children of immigrants.
item.content:encoded: Approximately two-thirds (66 per cent) of unicorns were founded or co-founded by immigrants or the children of immigrants.

item.title: UK's Only Woman Naval Commando Among 3 Killed In Helicopter Crash

media:content.media:description: Three Royal Navy personnel tragically lost their lives during a helicopter training exercise on 3 June.

item.description: Lily-Mae Fisher, who died when a Merlin Mk4 helicopter crashed during routine training in southwest England, was "Britain's only serving female Royal Navy Commando", the navy said.
item.content:encoded: Lily-Mae Fisher, who died when a Merlin Mk4 helicopter crashed during routine training in southwest England, was "Britain's only serving female Royal Navy Commando", the navy said.

item.title: 11 Killed In Fresh Israeli Strikes On Gaza

media:content.media:description: Israel has killed at least 936 people since the ceasefire began.

item.description: Despite a truce technically in effect since October, daily violence has rocked the Gaza Strip, over half of which is under Israeli military control in defiance of the ceasefire's terms.
item.content:encoded: Despite a truce technically in effect since October, daily violence has rocked the Gaza Strip, over half of which is under Israeli military control in defiance of the ceasefire's terms.

item.title: Ready For "Full Ceasefire": Zelensky In Open Letter To Putin

media:content.media:description: Volodymyr Zelensky also proposed a face-to-face meeting with Vladimir Putin.

item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky proposed a face-to-face meeting with Vladimir Putin in a rare open letter to the Russian leader Thursday, saying he was also ready for a "full ceasefire".
item.content:encoded: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky proposed a face-to-face meeting with Vladimir Putin in a rare open letter to the Russian leader Thursday, saying he was also ready for a "full ceasefire".

item.title: 'Happens In Families': Netanyahu Plays Down Trump's "F***ing Crazy" Remark

media:content.media:description: Netanyahu insisted the relationship remains strong despite the occasional disagreement

item.description: The comments came after US President Donald Trump acknowledged reports that he had used strong language during a phone call with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu over Israel's military operations in Lebanon.
item.content:encoded: The comments came after US President Donald Trump acknowledged reports that he had used strong language during a phone call with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu over Israel's military operations in Lebanon.

item.title: Video: Lufthansa Boeing 787's Nose Gear Collapses At Airport, Several Injured

media:content.media:description: Emergency vehicles were seen surrounding the widebody aircraft after the collapse

item.description: The aircraft's front section suddenly dropped onto the tarmac while it was stationary at the gate. Video footage circulating online showed the jet's nose dipping sharply, with a panel appearing to come loose as the aircraft settled onto the ground.
item.content:encoded: The aircraft's front section suddenly dropped onto the tarmac while it was stationary at the gate. Video footage circulating online showed the jet's nose dipping sharply, with a panel appearing to come loose as the aircraft settled onto the ground.

item.title: How This UK Spy Used Mother-In-Law's Blackberry Jam To Win Over Hamid Karzai

media:content.media:description: Younger was knighted by Queen Elizabeth II in 2019 and stepped down as MI6 chief the following year

item.description: One story from that period that became particularly well-known was to build a closer relationship with then Afghan President Hamid Karzai, Younger arranged for homemade blackberry jam prepared by his mother-in-law to be sent to him after learning Karzai enjoyed it in his tea.
item.content:encoded: One story from that period that became particularly well-known was to build a closer relationship with then Afghan President Hamid Karzai, Younger arranged for homemade blackberry jam prepared by his mother-in-law to be sent to him after learning Karzai enjoyed it in his tea.

item.title: 'Exaggerated': Israel Envoy On Reports of Donald Trump, Benjamin Netanyahu Rift

media:content.media:description: Reuven Azar cautioned against drawing "far-fetched conclusions" from isolated remarks.

item.description: Reuven Azar attributed the perceived friction to the leaders' differing personal styles rather than any fundamental strategic divergence.
item.content:encoded: Reuven Azar attributed the perceived friction to the leaders' differing personal styles rather than any fundamental strategic divergence.
